articles.title: Ethereum flips Costco, Johnson & Johnson as market cap grows by $150B this month
articles.description: Ethereum (ETH) has climbed 43% in a month, boosting its market cap past $435 billion and putting it ahead of retail giant Costco and healthcare heavyweight Johnson & Johnson in size, CompaniesMarketCap data shows. Ethereums market cap has climbed by over $100 billion since July 1. The second-largest crypto asset is now closing in on Mastercard and Netflix, the next two giants ahead of it by market cap. Mastercard is valued at over $504 billion, while Netflix sits at around $542 billion

BlackRock Increases Ethereum Holdings with Significant Purchase
articles.description: According to TechFlow, on July 18, blockchain analytics platform Lookonchain reported that BlackRock acquired an additional 158,875 Ethereum (ETH) valued at approximately $574 million. This purchase brings the institution's two-day total to 363,445 ETH, worth around $1. 31 billion. Currently, BlackRock's total Ethereum holdings have reached 2. 46 million ETH, with an estimated value of $8. 9 billion.
